# The Label Studio

> Premium custom label and garment trim studio for fashion brands — woven labels, leather patches, hangtags, care labels, embroidered patches, and packaging.

An editorial e-commerce studio specializing in luxury brand trims: signature woven neck labels, satin and damask weaves, embossed leather patches, foil hangtags, soft-touch care labels, embroidered and chenille patches, and complete packaging suites. Brief → Design → Stitch → Ship.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview, featured trims, and process journey.
- [Services](/services): Capabilities, materials, finishes, and how we work with brands.
- [About](/about): The studio, craft, and atelier.
- [Press](/press): Editorial features and brand collaborations.

## Collections

- [All Labels](/collections/all): Full catalog of labels, patches, hangtags, and packaging.
- [Woven Labels](/collections/woven-labels): Damask, satin, and high-density woven labels.
- [Leather Patches](/collections/leather-patches): Embossed and vegan leather brand patches.
- [Hangtags](/collections/hangtags): Foil, kraft, and minimal hangtags.
- [Care Labels](/collections/care-labels): Soft-touch and heat-transfer care labels.
- [Embroidered Patches](/collections/embroidered-patches): Logo and chenille varsity patches.
- [Packaging](/collections/packaging): Premium packaging and brand trim kits.
- [Custom OEM](/collections/custom-oem): Bespoke trim development.

## Featured Products

- [Signature Woven Neck Label](/products/signature-woven-neck-label): Flagship woven neck label.
- [Embossed Leather Patch](/products/embossed-leather-patch): Premium leather brand patch.
- [Luxury Foil Hangtag](/products/luxury-foil-hangtag): Foil-stamped hangtag.
- [Premium Packaging Suite](/products/premium-packaging-suite): Complete branded packaging set.

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs.
